title: Something is wrong with Automation - no more + signs
excerpt: Hey everyone something is wrong with my automations on desktop and in chrome/browser versions. When I go to click automations, the + sign to create my own is no longer there. Anyone else having this issue? Below is a pho…

posts.author: thynkconsultinggroup (Alexa DAgostino)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone something is wrong with my automations on desktop and in chrome/browser versions. When I go to click automations, the + sign to create my own is no longer there. Anyone else having this issue? Below is a photo.

Screen Shot 2023-01-03 at 9.31.44 AM804×402 10.3 KB

posts.author: DanIngham-IOI (Dan Ingham IOI / BPX)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @thynkconsultinggroup
Hope all is well

You will only see the + once you have selected the first trigger
same with the Action
Hope this helps
Many thanks Dan
